name: laravel/laravel
description: The skeleton application for the Laravel framework.

dev: npx concurrently -c "#93c5fd,#c4b5fd,#fb7185,#fdba74" "php artisan serve" "php artisan queue:listen --tries=1 --timeout=0" "php artisan pail --timeout=0" "npm run dev" --names=server,queue,logs,vite --kill-others
post-autoload-dump: @php -r "if (file_exists('vendor/minishlink/web-push/src/Encryption.php')) { $f = 'vendor/minishlink/web-push/src/Encryption.php'; $c = file_get_contents($f); if (strpos($c, 'str_pad(gmp_strval') === false) { $c = str_replace(['gmp_strval($publicKey->getPoint()->getX(), 16)', 'gmp_strval($publicKey->getPoint()->getY(), 16)', 'gmp_strval($privateKey->getSecret(), 16)', 'gmp_strval($curve->mul($pub_key->getPoint(), $priv_key->getSecret())->getX(), 16)'], ['str_pad(gmp_strval($publicKey->getPoint()->getX(), 16), 64, \'0\', STR_PAD_LEFT)', 'str_pad(gmp_strval($publicKey->getPoint()->getY(), 16), 64, \'0\', STR_PAD_LEFT)', 'str_pad(gmp_strval($privateKey->getSecret(), 16), 64, \'0\', STR_PAD_LEFT)', 'str_pad(gmp_strval($curve->mul($pub_key->getPoint(), $priv_key->getSecret())->getX(), 16), 64, \'0\', STR_PAD_LEFT)'], $c); file_put_contents($f, $c); } }"
